title: cuphea sordida
intro: Cuphea sordida is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Cuphea sordida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties against certain bacteria and fungi. In traditional herbal medicine, Cuphea sordida is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human use.
